title: Geometry Quality + Setback/Margin Rules

checks.frontend_vite_build: passed with large MapLibre bundle warning

new_capabilities: default pre-design setback rules by roof type

truth_boundary: Setback outputs are pre-design geometry checks only. They do not approve structural safety, wind loading, ballast, roof fixing, MCS compliance, or install readiness.
